allow: Bash(printf "what's the main entry point of this project? Briefly.\\n/quit\\n" | ./v100 run --provider minimax 2>&1)
Bash(printf "Hello, briefly introduce yourself\\n/quit\\n" | ./v100 run --provider gemini 2>&1)
Bash(printf "Hello, briefly introduce yourself\\n/quit\\n" | ./v100 run --provider codex 2>&1)
Bash(echo "what tools do you have available? list them briefly" | timeout 60 ./v100 run --provider gemini 2>&1)
Bash(echo "list files in the current directory" | timeout 60 ./v100 run --provider codex 2>&1)
Bash(cd /home/v/main/ai/xxchain && go test ./... && echo "✅ All tests passed" && ./xxchain compile --input examples/defi_scout.json --output /tmp/final.sol && echo "✅ Contract generated")

Bash(cd /home/v/main/ai/xxchain && ./xxchain deploy \\
  --contract /tmp/DeFiScout.sol \\
  --owner 0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890 \\
  --chain base-sepolia \\
  --identity DeFiScout \\
  --description "Autonomously identifies and executes arbitrage opportunities on Base" 2>&1)
